label: Skyfaller properties
description: Properties for things that fall from the sky (drop pods, meteorites, toxic fallout), controlling movement, shadow, impact damage, and sound.

movementType.label: Movement type
movementType.description: Controls how the skyfaller decelerates or accelerates during descent.

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: Descent speed in cells per second.

shadowType.label: Shadow type
shadowType.description: ShadowData for the ground shadow drawn beneath the falling object.

impactDef.label: Impact def
impactDef.description: ThingDef spawned at the landing site on impact.

impactExplosionRadius.label: Impact explosion radius
impactExplosionRadius.description: Radius of an explosion triggered on landing. 0 means no explosion.

impactDamageDef.label: Impact damage def
impactDamageDef.description: DamageDef applied to things at the landing site on impact.

impactDamage.label: Impact damage
impactDamage.description: Amount of impact damage applied to things at the landing site.

cameraShake.label: Camera shake
cameraShake.description: Strength of the camera shake applied on landing.

soundHit.label: Sound hit
soundHit.description: SoundDef played when this skyfaller lands.

comeFromSide.label: Come from side
comeFromSide.description: If true, this skyfaller approaches from the edge of the map rather than directly from overhead.
